allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\total-renotech-app" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\total-renotech-app"\)\) { Write-Host "Directory does not exist" })

Bash(node -e "const wf = require\('./n8n-workflows/national-wo-email-intake.json'\); const nodes = wf[0].nodes; console.log\('Nodes:', nodes.length\); nodes.forEach\(n => console.log\(' -', n.name\)\); console.log\('Connections:'\); Object.entries\(wf[0].connections\).forEach\(\([from, c]\) => { c.main.forEach\(\(targets, i\) => { targets.forEach\(t => console.log\('  ', from, '--[' + i + ']-->', t.node\)\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const wf = require\('./n8n-workflows/national-wo-email-intake.json'\); const trigger = wf[0].nodes.find\(n => n.name.includes\('Gmail Trigger'\)\); console.log\('Trigger filters:', JSON.stringify\(trigger.parameters.filters, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Options:', JSON.stringify\(trigger.parameters.options, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Poll:', JSON.stringify\(trigger.parameters.pollTimes, null, 2\)\); const senderNode = wf[0].nodes.find\(n => n.name === 'IF: Approved Sender'\); console.log\('Sender check expression:', JSON.stringify\(senderNode.parameters.conditions.conditions[0].leftValue\)\);")

PowerShell($timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'; Copy-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\.n8n\\database.sqlite" "D:\\total-renotech-app\\.n8n-backups\\database-$timestamp.sqlite"; Write-Output "Backed up to database-$timestamp.sqlite")

Bash(node -e "const wf = require\('./n8n-workflows/national-wo-email-intake.json'\); const creds = {}; wf[0].nodes.filter\(n => n.credentials?.gmailOAuth2\).forEach\(n => { const c = n.credentials.gmailOAuth2.id; creds[c] = \(creds[c] || 0\) + 1; }\); console.log\('Credential usage:', JSON.stringify\(creds\)\); console.log\('Nodes:', wf[0].nodes.length\); console.log\('Trigger filter:', JSON.stringify\(wf[0].nodes[0].parameters.filters\)\);")

PowerShell($attempts = 0; while \($attempts -lt 30\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "Server is up"; break } } catch {} $attempts++; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; if \($attempts -ge 30\) { "Server did not start in time" })
